targets.rawSql: SELECT completed_at AS time, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (completed_at - started_at))/60.0 AS value FROM forecast_runs WHERE status='completed' AND $__timeFilter(completed_at) ORDER BY completed_at
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status='completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS rate FROM forecast_runs WHERE started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM forecast_jobs WHERE run_id=(SELECT run_id FROM forecast_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1) AND status='failed'
WITH r AS (SELECT run_id FROM forecast_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM forecast_jobs WHERE run_id=(SELECT run_id FROM r) GROUP BY status
SELECT job_id, run_id, sku, attempts, last_error FROM forecast_jobs WHERE status='failed' ORDER BY job_id DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Run başına SKU sayısı (cold vs warm)

targets.rawSql: SELECT fr.started_at AS time, sr.mode::text AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM sku_runs sr JOIN forecast_runs fr USING(run_id) WHERE $__timeFilter(fr.started_at) GROUP BY fr.started_at, sr.mode ORDER BY fr.started_at
